title: Senior Software Engineer - Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies!
